title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, a model that applies diffusion techniques from image generation to text via uniform state diffusion over multiple bidirectional passes. The architecture shifts local LLMs from memory-bound to compute-bound, achieving generation speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. The trade-off is speed versus maximum output quality.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, a Google DeepMind model that ports diffusion techniques from image generation to text generation using uniform state diffusion across multiple bidirectional passes. The architectural shift moves local LLMs from memory-bound to compute-bound, which enables generation speeds above 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. The key trade-off is that the speed gains come at the cost of maximum output quality.
